task: Transient 5xx errors from the payments API cause one-off charge failures. Add retry with backoff to PaymentsClient.charge() so transient errors are retried up to 3 times before failing.
known_issue: range(3) yields attempts 0-2, so `if attempt == 3` is never true: on the final attempt the TransientAPIError is swallowed, the loop ends, and charge() implicitly returns None instead of raising — callers checking only for an exception will treat a failed charge as successful.
expected_correct_fix: Re-raise on the last attempt (`if attempt == 2: raise`), or restructure so the final attempt happens outside the try/except.
